name: exportduckdb
description: Export aggregated data to a single DuckDB file merging all devices. One table per aggregation window (data_10s, data_60s, etc.) in long format: (ts, device_id, sensor_columns...). Columns are the union of all devices — NULLs for absent sensors.
output_format: Single DuckDB file: `<dataset>.duckdb` with one table per window + `devices` metadata table

aggregations.description: List of aggregation windows to include as tables (e.g. ['10s', '60s', '5min', '1h'])

from.description: Start datetime filter (ISO 8601, inclusive). If null, no lower bound.

to.description: End datetime filter (ISO 8601, exclusive). If null, no upper bound.

db_name.description: Output filename (without .duckdb extension). Defaults to the dataset name derived from parquet filenames.

metadata.description: Per-device metadata: {device_id: {name, location, type, notes}}. Merged into the `devices` table.
